meta.poznamky: 3 čtverce 40/70/100px ze středu. Každý = smyčka, mezi nimi penUp a posun zpět.

cms.task_text: Naprogramujte [hlp]tři soustředné čtverce[/hlp] o stranách 40, 70 a 100 pixelů. Všechny vycházejí ze středu.
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r1" x="20" y="20"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f1"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg1"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r2"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f2"><field name="DISTANCE">70</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg2"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r3"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f3"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg3"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
